chapter_title.en: Chapter on Kindness and Avoiding Deception in Sales

text: 3985 - قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ ، لِزَيْنَبَ اَلْعَطَّارَةِ اَلْحَوْلاَءِ "إِذَا بِعْتِ فَأَحْسِنِي وَ لاَ تَغُشِّي فَإِنَّهُ أَنْقَى وَ أَبْقَى لِلْمَالِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3985 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (may Allah (swt) bless him and his family) said to Zaynab, the perfume seller, known as Al-Hawla': "When you sell, do so with excellence and do not deceive, for it is purer and more enduring for wealth."
